summary: REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear implemented: a new AuditionPerksBlock renders three distinct items (Food, Training, Scary Vibes) within the homepage Auditions section, and the audition dates/hours strings remain unchanged. However, the diff also expands/changes the roles list with new roles and descriptions that were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Expanded/modified Auditions roles list by adding new roles (e.g., Costume Manager, Masks Manager) and long horror descriptions.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest only asked to add a new Food/Training/Scary Vibes layout block while preserving existing audition dates/hours; it did not request changing or expanding the roles list content.
